response.justification: The candidate lacks direct C++ development experience on Windows in capital markets or fixed-income domains, with most recent roles focused on TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang in non-financial contexts; while there is brief C++ exposure from 2014–2015 in LabWindows, it is outdated and not in the required domain, and SQL experience is listed without context or depth in financial systems.
strengths: Strong full-stack and polyglot development background with diverse tech exposure
Demonstrated experience in CI/CD, testing practices, and open-source contributions
Proven ability to deliver complex systems across domains (GIS, real-time data, automation)
concerns: No recent or relevant C++ experience on Windows in capital markets
Lacks demonstrated fixed income, investment banking, or capital markets domain expertise
SQL skills listed without context of financial databases or high-performance trading systems
